tier3Eligibility.blocker: Tier 3 ineligible until package signing first pass for payment-sensitive marketplace-payment package distribution.
tier3Eligibility.reason: FLOW-16 is payment-sensitive because checkout, escrow, non-repudiation audit, payout vault references, and tenant-scope guarantees are part of the certified package path. The session completed cascade, auth, registry, CI, and visual evidence gates, but package signing is still required before Tier 3 distribution can be declared.

productDecisionClosure.decision: FLOW-16 completes the mobility/auth protocol evidence through three tenant repos, three adapted packages, green GitHub Actions, Verdaccio readback, screenshots, and post-cascade live auth. Certification is capped at Tier 2+ until the package-signing first pass is implemented for payment-sensitive distribution.
evidence: Tenant B installed from Tenant A, adapted, and published @xiigen-fork/northwind-controlled-marketplace-payments@1.0.2.
Tenant C installed from Tenant B, adapted, and published @xiigen-fork/tessera-community-marketplace-payments@1.0.3.
Post-cascade live Docker/Vault auth matrix passed 8/8.
Package-signing first pass remains pending and prevents Tier 3 declaration.

tierBasis: Docker/Vault auth completed with tenant credentials and signing keys under all three tenant Vault paths.
Tenant A forked original FLOW-16 source through the marketplace API, adapted, published v1.0.1, and passed real GitHub Actions.
Tenant B forked Tenant A through the marketplace API, adapted, published v1.0.2, and passed real GitHub Actions.
Tenant C forked Tenant B through the marketplace API, adapted, published v1.0.3, and passed real GitHub Actions.
Local registry readbacks match each adapted repo gitHead and package shasum.
Real repo, Actions, registry, and viewport screenshots exist for each cascade point.
Post-cascade auth matrix passed 8/8 with Vault-backed JWTs and no secret material committed.
Tier 3 is withheld because package signing first pass is still pending for payment-sensitive distribution.

tenantBInstalled.note: initial inherited assertion run failed, repaired package assertion run passed

tenantCInstalled.note: initial inherited assertion run failed, repaired package assertion run passed

verification.registryReadbacks: passed for Acme v1.0.1, Northwind v1.0.2, and Tessera v1.0.3; all returned expected versions, shasums, gitHead values, and xiigen plugin SDK metadata.
verification.githubActions: passed for original Tenant A fork plus adapted Tenant A, Tenant B, and Tenant C repos; Tenant B/C install repos passed after tenant assertion repair.
verification.cascadePngs: 72 cascade PNGs across four cascade points, 0 zero-byte files; 13 repo-evidence PNG files present for FLOW-16.
verification.behavioralAssertion: FLOW-16 payment-sensitive safeguards preserved: checkout lock TTL, platform fee basis points, escrow auto release days, outbox order, non-repudiation audit, payout vault references, and tenant-scope checks.
verification.blocker: Package-signing first pass remains pending; Tier 3 not declared.
